{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323150849160E0F8C0867BFAED806\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7443682103122182948","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书中内容通俗易懂，还介绍了很多实用的技巧，让我对动漫游戏角色设计有了更全面的了解。想起我在大学时参加的动漫社，当时对角色设计特别感兴趣，这本书简直就是我的梦想之书！我相信它会对我未来的职业发展有很大的帮助。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731531597,"group_id":"7432172878562331673","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxBp9u6SIRsHyHHEwasG571hF4dwvnG4wzpdQL/S0wDO","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1330878793392393","user_name":"诛天殿的道飞宇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1330878793392393","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7432172878562331673","book_info":{"abstract":"《动漫游戏角色设计》介绍了写实角色的创建过程，高面人体模型的布线及高面模型在各行各业的应用。还介绍了Bones骨骼和Character Studio对象的一些基础功能，以及通过控制该类型的物体创建角色动画的方法。在角色模型创建完毕后，可以通过设置顶点关键帧来创建动画，从而对角色的制作流程有全面系统的了解和认识。《动漫游戏角色设计》语言通俗易懂，内容丰富翔实，突出了以实用为中心的特点，可以作为本科及高职高专学生学习动漫游戏色彩相关专业的教科书，也可以作为从事动漫游戏方面开发的爱好者的入门参考书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3ff02511cb0188b73e6e0c1642464fa3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"袁琳","author_id":"","book_id":"7432172878562331673","book_name":"动漫游戏角色设计","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c0a0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1013人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":978,\"name\":\"教育学习\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=978\u0026name=教育学习\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":345,\"name\":\"高等教育\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=345\u0026name=高等教育\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7432172943272070206","read_count":"37","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"8"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"1","tags":"教育学习,高等教育","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3ff02511cb0188b73e6e0c1642464fa3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779433729\u0026x-signature=827w5cQhP18OaPyXgqtFAqtcS3U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323150849160E0F8C0867BFAED806\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21300,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":52},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"",
